intro.title: From high-school mathematics and community work to software products.
intro.summary: This page keeps the detailed record of Ka Vatana's education, experience, activities, awards, and growth timeline. The About page stays short; this archive keeps the names, dates, and event details organized.

snapshot.label: Current identity
snapshot.value: Year 1 Software Engineering Student · Product Builder · Co-founder of Chomkar.com · Founder of Chnai Lab

snapshot.label: Current studies

details: Studying software engineering fundamentals.
Learning full-stack development, programming, databases, web systems, and AI-assisted workflows.
Building real projects outside class to improve practical development ability.
Current focus: full-stack development, product thinking, startup projects, and AI-assisted software building.
Studying Year 1 English to improve academic, technical, and professional communication.
Uses English for documentation, project explanation, company communication, and technical learning.
Strong background in mathematics, STEM activities, public speaking, competitions, and community involvement.
Recognized as 2nd place ranking student in the Outstanding Mathematics Student Competition, Phnom Penh, April 2022.

experience.role: Web System / Digital Project Support Contractor
details: Scheduled 3-month contract period: July 2026 - October 2026.
Scope includes web system development and digital project tasks.
Scope includes website design, development, testing, bug fixing, and implementation support.
Scope includes digital marketing, content creation, operation, localization, and community-related work when needed.
Professional learning focus: company workflow, task reporting, communication, project discipline, and Cambodia × Japan technology collaboration.
Achievement: Top 2 — Turing Hackathon Cycle 10.
Theme: Market Access for Farmers.
Project evolution: KasekorX AI voice-to-marketplace idea for farmers → Chomkar.com.
Co-founded and helped shape the project direction.
Worked on product strategy, user flow, and market-access problem framing.
Contributed as a full-stack engineer to build and improve the digital product.
Helped define buyer and farmer flows.
Supported pitch deck preparation, demo flow, and business model explanation.
Worked on positioning the project for hackathon judging and startup validation.
Founded and developed the early direction of Chnai Lab.
Gather and coordinate team members.
Lead early product planning and project direction.
Explore digital projects, AI-assisted workflows, web systems, and startup prototypes.
Use Chnai Lab as a practical environment to learn leadership, team building, execution, and product development.
Website: kavatana.me.
Built a personal portfolio website to present identity, projects, learning journey, and professional direction.
Focused on honest junior developer branding, project-based learning, and professional presentation.
Designed the portfolio to show growth as a software engineering student, not to overclaim senior-level experience.
Used it as a public home for projects, experience, and learning direction.
Supported digital marketing activities for an education/community-related platform.
Helped with content, page activity, and audience communication.
Built early experience in digital media, content strategy, and online engagement.
Developed communication and marketing skills before transitioning deeper into software engineering.
